title: Legislation
description: A piece of legislation, resolution, or policy position the Manhattan Borough President supports or advocates for — the office's policy/report output. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Legislation' dataset (uf8p-ervp, 4 columns): name, subject, status, and a link. The linked document is external (state/city legislative sites), so the substance is a URL rather than structured text.

status.description: Current status ('Status'), e.g. Introduced, Passed, Signed.
